# Jeremie Louvaert

> Open-source developer and founder of AKURATE.STUDIO. Builds production-grade custom nodes for ComfyUI — the leading node-based UI for AI image/video generation workflows.

## Projects

- [ComfyUI-Darkroom](https://github.com/jeremieLouvaert/ComfyUI-Darkroom): Professional color grading & film emulation suite for ComfyUI. 34 nodes across 5 modules: Film Emulation (6 nodes, 161 stocks from real Capture One curve data), Camera Raw (9 nodes), Color Grading (9 nodes — Tone Curve, Lift Gamma Gain, Log Wheels, 3-Way Color Balance, Hue/Lum/Sat curves, Color Warper), Lens & Optics (5 nodes, 102 real lens profiles), Pipeline (5 nodes — LUT export/apply .cube, Color Space Transform with ACES/Rec.2020/P3, ACES Tonemap). 75+ presets. Physics-based, zero API costs.
- [ComfyUI-Gemini-Direct](https://github.com/jeremieLouvaert/ComfyUI-Gemini-Direct): Direct Google Gemini image generation for ComfyUI. Bypass credits, use your own API key. Drop-in replacement for Nano Banana Pro. Includes Prompt Studio for AI-powered prompt enhancement.
- [ComfyUI-Gemini-Conversation-Canvas](https://github.com/jeremieLouvaert/ComfyUI-Gemini-Conversation-Canvas): Multi-turn conversational image editing powered by Google Gemini. Session persistence, edit chaining, visual gallery. The only ComfyUI node suite leveraging Gemini's conversation memory for iterative image editing.
- [ComfyUI-Higgsfield-Direct](https://github.com/jeremieLouvaert/ComfyUI-Higgsfield-Direct): Direct Higgsfield API integration — multi-model image & video generation (Soul 2.0, Seedream 4, Reve, Kling 2.1, Seedance, DOP). Text-to-Image, Image Edit, Image-to-Video, Model Info nodes.
- [ComfyUI-API-Optimizer](https://github.com/jeremieLouvaert/ComfyUI-API-Optimizer): Production-grade API optimization — cost tracking with budget enforcement, deterministic hash caching, lazy execution bypass. Supports any cloud API provider.
- [ComfyUI-Prompt-Vault](https://github.com/jeremieLouvaert/ComfyUI-Prompt-Vault): Photographic prompt arsenal — 21 curated templates + component builder with 100+ components (27 cameras, 24 lighting setups, 18 film stocks, 15 moods). Persistent favorites system.
- [comfyui-wireless-link-simple](https://github.com/jeremieLouvaert/comfyui-wireless-link-simple): Wireless data transmission nodes inspired by Blackmagic Fusion. Send/Get any data type without visible wires.

## Links
